_notes: PLACEHOLDERS TO FILL IN: organizer (manager's real email), drop_folder (the real local path to the OneDrive-synced Drop library once it's created), write_path ('primary' if the coach came out as organiser in the §7 test, 'fallback' if the manager did). coaches/agents_by_coach are left empty here on purpose -- bridge.merge_mapping_into_cfg() fills them at runtime from CoachAgentMapping.xlsx once that sheet has real rows, so you don't have to duplicate the list by hand. schedule_type: 1=by 10th, 2=11-20th, 3=21st-end, 4=weekly across up to 4 weeks, 5=anytime. population: 'manager' (manager's own meeting), 'coaches' (one per coach, on manager's calendar), 'agents' (one per agent, on that agent's COACH's calendar).
